data.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant docs to reflect the planning pipeline completeness improvements.
**Why**: After the other 4 stories land, CLAUDE.md's architecture section, quick reference, and complexity evaluator documentation need to reflect the new blast-radius scoring, brainstorm SC gate, and bidirectional TDD framework.
**Scope**:
- IN: Updates to CLAUDE.md (architecture section describing blast-radius scoring, evaluator routing changes, bidirectional TDD). Updates to any existing docs that reference the complexity evaluator, brainstorm gap analysis, or implementation-plan TDD framework.
- OUT: Creating new documentation files. Changes to skill files (those are handled by stories 1-4).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes the blast-radius scoring in the complexity evaluator, the SC alignment gate in brainstorm, and the bidirectional TDD framework in implementation-plan
  ← Satisfies: "validate.sh --ci passes after all changes" (docs accuracy is part of overall project health)
- When this story is complete, no existing documentation references stale descriptions of the evaluator routing or TDD framework

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
